designer.name: Liat Vax
designer.title: Senior Product Designer
designer.tagline: My favorite design tool is the word "why." Every simple solution starts there.

about.headline: I make complex products feel obvious.
bio: Senior Product Designer and Research Lead with 10+ years of experience. I own the whole arc of a product — from early requirements and research through design systems, dev handoff and QA — usually shoulder-to-shoulder with PMs, engineers and whoever else it takes to get it right. I've also built a research function almost from scratch.

My path into UX started in CX consulting, where I spent years studying how people actually behave, not how they say they do. That grounding in real human behaviour shapes everything I design, and an MBA in Big Data & Analytics keeps my instincts honest, so every creative call comes with data to back it up.
Outside of work, I'm usually making something — art, tasty food, or memories with my family.

contact.availability: Actively looking for a full-time role in product design. Open to interesting projects and collaborations.

projects.title: VIA — Verint Intraday Automation
projects.description: Real-time workforce automation — from AI brainstorming to a breakthrough conflict detection nobody had seen coming.

projects.title: IEC New Website
projects.description: An extensive redesign of the IEC website — clarity and efficiency first, across every device and user type.

projects.title: American Well
projects.description: A reimagined dashboard that turned data overload into confident, clear action for clinicians and administrators.

projects.title: IDF — Emergency Instructors
projects.description: Two complementary systems built from scratch for emergency instructor management in the Israel Defense Forces.
